items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Gains As Trump Says Iran War Is 'Very Complete;' Pharma Stock Dives (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow Jones index came off lows on the stock market today. Oil prices surged on the U.S.-Iran war. Nvidia outperformed and Hims popped.

items.description: ALLO, SBUX and AMGN highlight how Zacks strategies and portfolio picks are delivering strong gains despite recent market volatility.

items.title: Q4 Earnings Highs And Lows: Amgen (NASDAQ:AMGN) Vs The Rest Of The Therapeutics Stocks
items.description: Earnings results often indicate what direction a company will take in the months ahead. With Q4 behind us, let’s have a look at Amgen (NASDAQ:AMGN) and its peers.

items.title: The first KRAS drugs have been sluggish on the market. Will the next generation fare better?
items.description: The regulatory success of KRAS-targeting therapies marked a watershed moment, but there is room for improvement in the real world.
